name: Minor Healing
description: A minor healing prayer that restores a small amount of hit points.

name: Light Healing
description: A light healing prayer that restores a moderate amount of hit points.

name: Heal
description: A powerful healing prayer that restores a significant amount of hit points.

name: Greater Heal
description: A greater healing prayer that restores a large amount of hit points.

name: Complete Heal
description: The most powerful single-target heal in all of Norrath, restoring all hit points.

name: Armor of Faith
description: Surrounds the target with divine armor, increasing their armor class.

name: Divine Light
description: Channels holy light as a weapon against the undead and evil.

name: Smite Undead
description: Channels holy power to destroy undead creatures.

name: Resurrection
description: Resurrects a fallen ally, returning them to life with 96% experience restored.

name: Spirit of Wolf
description: Infuses the target with the spirit of a wolf, greatly increasing their movement speed.

name: Chloroplast
description: Causes the target to regenerate hit points over time through natural energies.

name: Snare
description: Entangles the target in magical snares, reducing their movement speed.

name: Moonfire
description: Calls down concentrated moonfire on the target, dealing magical damage.

name: Sunbolt
description: Hurls a bolt of concentrated sunlight that sears the target.

name: Group Spirit of Wolf
description: Infuses all nearby allies with the spirit of a wolf, greatly increasing their movement speed.

name: Succor
description: Teleports all nearby allies to a safe location within the current zone.

name: Egress
description: Teleports the caster to a safe location within the current zone.

name: Healing Breeze
description: A powerful regeneration spell that causes the target to heal rapidly over time.

name: Shock of Ice
description: Sends a chilling burst of ice at the target.

name: Ice Comet
description: Calls a massive comet of ice crashing down on the target.

name: Concussive Burst
description: Creates a concussive magical explosion centered on the target.

name: Lava Bolt
description: Launches a bolt of molten lava at the target.

name: Sunstrike
description: Channels the power of the sun into a devastating strike.

name: Translocate
description: Teleports the caster to a distant location.

name: Root
description: Roots the target in place, preventing movement.

name: Gate
description: Opens a magical gate to the caster's bind point.

name: Lifetap
description: Drains life force from the target, healing the caster for the same amount.

name: Fear
description: Fills the target with overwhelming fear, causing them to flee in terror.

name: Bond of Death
description: A powerful curse that drains life from the target over time.

name: Dark Empathy
description: Establishes a dark empathic link that drains the target's health.

name: Siphon Strength
description: Drains strength from the target, weakening their attacks.

name: Cavorting Bones
description: Animates bones to create a skeletal minion to fight at the caster's side.

name: Invoke Death
description: Calls forth a powerful undead warrior to serve the caster.

name: Mesmerize
description: Mesmerizes the target, rendering them immobile and unable to act.

name: Beguile
description: A powerful charm that turns the target into a temporary ally.

name: Alacrity
description: Imbues the target with incredible speed, greatly increasing their haste.

name: Clarity
description: Increases the target's mana regeneration rate substantially.

name: Clarion
description: Greatly increases the mana regeneration of all nearby allies.

name: Color Flux
description: Dazzles the target with a burst of colorful magical energy.

name: Choke
description: Causes the target to choke on magical vapors.

name: Torment of Argli
description: Afflicts the target with the torment of the spirit Argli.

name: Drowsy
description: Causes the target to become drowsy, slowing their attack speed.

name: Turgur's Insects
description: Swarms the target with magical insects, greatly slowing their attack speed.

name: Torpor
description: Puts the target in a state of torpor, rapidly regenerating their health over time.

name: Inner Fire
description: Infuses the target with inner fire, greatly increasing their maximum hit points.

name: Cannibalize
description: The shaman sacrifices their own health to restore mana.

name: Malosi
description: Weakens the target's magical resistances.

name: Summon Elemental
description: Summons an elemental to fight at the caster's side.

name: Fireball
description: Hurls a ball of fire at the target.

name: Inferno Shock
description: Channels a powerful inferno shock at the target.

name: Burnout
description: Empowers the caster's pet with additional strength and damage.

name: Lay on Hands
description: The paladin channels divine power to completely heal a target once per day.

name: Holy Might
description: Channels holy power as a weapon against evil.

name: Divine Light
description: A paladin healing prayer that restores a significant amount of hit points.

name: Harm Touch
description: The shadow knight channels dark power to devastate a single target once per day.

name: Heat Blood
description: Heats the blood of the target, causing intense pain over time.
